2606.22019.title: Channel Location Constrains the Auditability of Subliminal Learning
2606.22019.paper_summary: Subliminal learning lets a student inherit a teacher's hidden trait from distillation data that never names it. We ask when such transfer can be audited before training. The answer is not model identity or scale alone, but channel location: the carrier through which the trait reaches the student. We find three regimes. In a controlled initialization-dependent body channel, a pre-training screen works. Coverage, the cosine between the student's initial distillation update and the teacher's fine-tuning displacement, predicts held-out transfer (Spearman $ρ\approx 0.95$; AUROC 0.997). In pretrained language models, masked single-token traits instead ride convergent vocabulary geometry. This channel is initialization-independent, so initialization-alignment screens, including coverage, are not mechanistic; the useful handles are post-hoc detection and targeted mitigation. Even when a single-token named entity is removed from the loss, the student's held-out probability for that entity rises to 0.40 on average ($\sim 2500\times$), and a related semantic class transfers. In an untied-head model, orthogonalizing the trait's output row against entangled neighbours collapses leakage, while equal-size random-subspace edits do not. Thus removing a target string from distillation labels does not remove the corresponding preference: neighbouring tokens can carry it. Finally, conditional behaviours can route through the network body. For sycophancy, with agreement and correction markers masked from the loss, transfer reaches about 0.63 of the teacher's effect, localizes to body computation, and evades four audits across two model families. We scope this as masked transfer of a condition-present policy. Channel location is necessary for deciding which audits can be sound. It is not a deployment-ready screen: an audit used outside its carrier regime can give false assurance.
2606.22019.paper_summary_zh: 潛意識學習讓學生從未明言的蒸餾數據中繼承教師的隱藏特徵。我們詢問在訓練之前，這種轉移何時可以被審計。答案不僅僅是模型的身份或規模，而是通道位置：特徵到達學生的載體。我們發現三種情況。在受控的初始化依賴體通道中，預訓練篩選有效。覆蓋率，即學生的初始蒸餾更新與教師的微調位移之間的餘弦，預測保留的轉移（Spearman $ρ\approx 0.95$；AUROC 0.997）。在預訓練語言模型中，掩碼單個標記特徵則依賴於收斂的詞彙幾何。這個通道是與初始化無關的，因此初始化對齊篩選，包括覆蓋率，並不是機械性的；有用的手段是事後檢測和有針對性的減輕。即使從損失中移除單個標記命名實體，該實體的學生保留概率平均上升至0.40（$\sim 2500\times$），並且相關的語義類別會轉移。在未綁定頭模型中，將特徵的輸出行與糾纏的鄰居正交化可以消除洩漏，而相等大小的隨機子空間編輯則無法做到。因此，從蒸餾標籤中移除目標字符串並不會消除相應的偏好：鄰近的標記可以攜帶它。最後，條件行為可以通過網絡體路由。對於諂媚，當協議和修正標記從損失中掩蓋時，轉移達到教師效果的約0.63，定位於體計算，並在兩個模型系列中逃避四次審計。我們將此範疇視為條件存在政策的掩碼轉移。通道位置對於決定哪些審計可以是可靠的至關重要。這不是一個準備好部署的篩選：在其載體範疇外使用的審計可能會給出虛假的保證。
2606.22019.author: Tamas Madl et.al.
